prompt: Cinematic summer environmental portrait, vertical composition. Clear blue sky with luminous layered white clouds over an endless green wheat field swaying in a warm breeze. A young woman, ~20, fresh and unguarded, wears a white tee and a simple straight leg jeans. She walks forward along a narrow raised path through the wheat, not looking at the camera, hair lifted by wind. Low angle side view, 32mm lens, subject naturally centered, wheat field and sky surrounding her. Late morning sunlight - bright but soft, slight lens flare and highlight bloom; foreground wheat softly out of focus for depth. airy blue shadows, subtle 35mm grain, slight edge softness. No commercial pose, no excessive retouching, no obvious AI look. --ar 4:5 --raw --profile glu65pn 8ybnjf3 --stylize 150 --hd

promptZh: 电影感夏日户外人像，竖构图。晴朗蓝天下，层叠的明亮白云映衬着随暖风摇曳的一望无际的绿色麦田。一位 年轻女性，约 20 岁，清新自然，身着 白色 T 恤和简约直筒牛仔裤。她沿着麦田中狭窄的田埂向前走，没有看向镜头，头发被风吹起。低角度侧拍，32mm 镜头，主体自然居中，周围环绕着麦田与天空。上午的阳光明媚而柔和，带有轻微的镜头光晕和高光溢出；前景麦穗虚化以增强景深。清爽的蓝色阴影，细腻的 35mm 胶片颗粒感，边缘略带柔化。拒绝商业摆拍，拒绝过度修图，拒绝明显的 AI 感。 --ar 4:5 --raw --profile glu65pn 8ybnjf3 --stylize 150 --hd
